race.comment: MATROOSHI (12) is fitter for two runs back from a spell, progressing nicely last time to finish second, beaten a neck, at Swan Hill over 1300m. Has a win and three minor placings at this journey from five starts and is right in contention. ATOMIC GOLD (1) is a winner of 5 from 23, which is a good winning strike-rate compared to most rivals, and will find this much more to his liking than the first two runs back from a spell. The wide draw could present some issues, but gets in well after the claim. SACRED FORT (5) made an encouraging return two runs back and while ordinary last start, he's trialled well since. Just needs to find a path from the horror gate. DUBAI DANCER (2) is finding it hard to make an impact this campaign, last start finishing fourth over 1200m at Bordertown. Finds a nice race and can make an impact.
